#
# Install with:
#     pip install -r requirements.txt
#
# This is a lockfile generated from requirements.in. To change a dependency,
# edit requirements.in and regenerate:
#     pip-compile requirements.in                          # pip-tools
#     uv pip compile requirements.in -o requirements.txt   # uv
# Without those tools, pin to the exact versions resolved by `pip freeze`.
